title: Business Project Manager
description:
Job Overview
The Business Project Manager is responsible for overseeing BPA’s operational excellence, strategic initiatives, business development, sales growth, and event management. This role plays a key leadership function in driving organisational performance, strengthening partnerships with associations and stakeholders, and ensuring successful execution of projects and events aligned with company's vision.

Operations Management

  • Oversee daily business operations to ensure efficiency, compliance, and alignment with organisational objectives.
  • Develop,implement, and improve operational processes, systems, and workflows.
  • Coordinate across departments (coaching, administration, customer service, marketing) to ensure smooth operations.


Strategy & Planning

  • Support senior management in developing and executing short- and long-term business strategies.
  • Conduct market analysis and identify growth opportunities within sports, arts, and education sectors.
  • Translate strategic plans into actionable projects with clear timelines, budgets, and deliverables.
  • Track progress and ensure strategic initiatives are delivered on time and within scope.

Business Development

  • Identify and develop new business opportunities, partnerships, and revenue streams.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with local and international associations, federations, schools, sponsors, and partners.
  • Represent BPA in meetings, networking events, and industry engagements.
  • Prepare proposals, presentations, and collaboration agreements.

Association & Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the main point of contact for associations and governing bodies.
  • Maintain professional relationships to support competitions, certifications, events, and strategic collaborations.
  • Ensure compliance with association requirements, regulations, and timelines.

Event Management

  • Lead the planning, organisation, and execution of all BPA events, including competitions, camps, showcases, workshops, and corporate events.
  • Manage event budgets, timelines, logistics, vendors, and manpower.
  • Coordinate with internal teams, external partners, associations, and sponsors to ensure successful delivery.
  • Conduct post-event evaluations and reporting.


Sales & Revenue Growth

  • Drive sales initiatives for programmes, events, camps, and services offered by BPA.
  • Develop and execute sales strategies to meet enrolment and revenue targets.
  • Work closely with marketing and customer service teams to convert leads and retain clients.
  • Monitor sales performance and prepare forecasts and reports

Leadership & Project Management

  • Lead and manage cross-functional project teams.
  • Assign tasks, monitor progress, and ensure accountability.
  • Identify risks related to operations, events, and projects, and implement mitigation plans to ensure smooth execution and compliance.
  • Foster a collaborative, high-performance work culture.

postedCompany.description:
Who We Are

The Bianka Panova Sport and Art Academy was founded in 2015 in Singapore with the clear mission of providing the young upcoming talents with the highest levels of artistic and professional gymnastics training. Our Co-founder and Creative Director, Ms. Bianka Panova, is an Olympian and a nine-time World Champion in Rhythmic gymnastics. She has made significant contributions to the European rhythmic gymnastics and dancing world, as well as local.


What We Do

All students here in Singapore can now benefit from the opportunity to be trained at the highest levels of this beautiful sport brought to them by the Academy. Ever since the Academy’s inception, we have participated in several international competitions, representing Singapore on the world stage. Our students have achieved great success in China, Malaysia, Taiwan, Germany, and Netherlands. Hopefully this is just the first short chapter of our long journey in Singapore.
postedCompany.name: SG GYMNASTIC ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
